calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Adam N. Barasch, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Ally Bank,
Order Granting Ally's Application for waiver of Witness at Prove-up Hearing on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant David Yuen,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $56,706.21
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $400.00
Costs: $535.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $57,641.21

Judgment signed in open court.
